name: forge-remotion-loop
description: Render source (wayfinder #29) for the Forge panel loop. Winner: Blend-A-SequentialArc (the /forge Claude Code pipeline, terminal <-> rail in sync). Kept as the source for the shipped /videos/forge-pipeline.* assets — re-run `render:winner` after any tweak.

scripts.render:winner: remotion render src/index.ts Blend-A-SequentialArc ../public/videos/forge-pipeline.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts Blend-A-SequentialArc ../public/videos/forge-pipeline.webm --codec=vp8 && remotion still src/index.ts Blend-A-SequentialArc out/forge-pipeline-poster.png --frame=82 --image-format=png && ffmpeg -y -i out/forge-pipeline-poster.png -c:v libwebp -quality 88 ../public/videos/forge-pipeline-poster.webp
